member.summary: User login
member.response: Login successful, returns user info and JWT token
Invalid credentials or account is inactive

member.summary: Change password
member.response: Invalid data or incorrect old password

member.summary: Refresh access token using refresh token

member.summary: Logout user by revoking refresh token

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Application.Controllers.DatasetsController.CreateDataset(DataLabelProject.Application.DTOs.Datasets.CreateDatasetRequest)
member.summary: Create a new dataset. File upload is optional. Accepts image files or archive files (zip/rar) containing only image files.

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Application.Controllers.DatasetsController.GetDataset(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get dataset by ID with item count and metadata.

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Application.Controllers.DatasetsController.GetDatasetItems(System.Guid,DataLabelProject.Application.DTOs.Datasets.DatasetItemQueryParameters)
member.summary: Get all dataset items for a specific dataset.

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Application.Controllers.DatasetsController.DeleteDatasetItem(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete a dataset item by ID.

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Application.Controllers.DatasetsController.UpdateDataset(System.Guid,DataLabelProject.Application.DTOs.Datasets.UpdateDatasetRequest)
member.summary: Update an existing dataset. Can update name and description.

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Application.Controllers.DatasetsController.DeleteDataset(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete a dataset and all its associated data.

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Application.Controllers.DatasetsController.UploadDatasetItems(System.Guid,DataLabelProject.Application.DTOs.Datasets.CreateDatasetItemRequest)
member.summary: Upload a file or archive into an existing dataset. Accepts single image/audio/text or archive (zip/rar) containing allowed files. Uploads rely on strategy detection; dataset mediaType field no longer exists.

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Application.Controllers.DatasetsController.AddDataset(System.Guid,DataLabelProject.Application.DTOs.Datasets.AddDatasetRequest)
member.summary: Attach a dataset to a project. Only the creator of both the dataset and project can perform this operation.

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Application.Controllers.DatasetsController.RemoveDataset(System.Guid,DataLabelProject.Application.DTOs.Datasets.RemoveDatasetRequest)
member.summary: Detach a dataset to a project. Only the creator of both the dataset and project can perform this operation.

member.summary: DTO for project member response with user details

member.name: P:DataLabelProject.Business.Models.RefreshToken.TokenHash
member.summary: SHA256 hash of the refresh token

member.name: P:DataLabelProject.Business.Models.RefreshToken.RevokedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when token was revoked (logout or admin disabled user)

member.name: P:DataLabelProject.Business.Models.RefreshToken.ReplacedByToken
member.summary: Token ID that replaced this token during rotation

member.name: P:DataLabelProject.Business.Models.RefreshToken.IsActive
member.summary: Check if token is active (not revoked and not expired)

member.name: P:DataLabelProject.Business.Models.User.PasswordHash
member.summary: Hashed password for authentication

member.name: P:DataLabelProject.Business.Models.User.PhoneNumber
member.summary: VN format: 0xxxxxxxxx or +84xxxxxxxxx

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Auth.AuthService.HashPassword(System.String)
member.summary: Hash password using SHA256

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Auth.AuthService.VerifyPassword(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verify password against stored hash

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Auth.AuthService.LoginAsync(DataLabelProject.Application.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequest)
member.summary: Login method - validates user credentials and generates JWT + refresh tokens Prevents login when user.IsActive = false

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Auth.AuthService.RefreshTokenAsync(DataLabelProject.Application.DTOs.Auth.RefreshTokenRequest)
member.summary: Refresh token flow - validates refresh token and generates new token pair Implements token rotation (old token revoked, new token issued) Rejects disabled users

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Auth.AuthService.LogoutAsync(DataLabelProject.Application.DTOs.Auth.LogoutRequest)
member.summary: Logout - revokes refresh token

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Auth.AuthService.ChangePasswordAsync(System.Guid,DataLabelProject.Application.DTOs.Auth.ChangePasswordRequest)
member.summary: Change password for users Verifies old password before updating Returns error message if validation fails

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Auth.IJwtTokenService.GenerateAccessToken(System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generate JWT access token with 15 minutes expiry

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Auth.IJwtTokenService.GenerateRefreshToken
member.summary: Generate secure random refresh token (base64 encoded)

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Auth.IJwtTokenService.HashRefreshToken(System.String)
member.summary: Hash refresh token using SHA256

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Auth.IJwtTokenService.GetAccessTokenExpiryMinutes
member.summary: Get access token expiry duration in minutes

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Auth.IJwtTokenService.GetRefreshTokenExpiryDays
member.summary: Get refresh token expiry duration in days

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Consensus.AgreementService.CalculateOverallScore(System.Collections.Generic.List{DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Consensus.BoxCluster},System.Int32)
member.summary: Majority vote: for each cluster, score = annotators voting majority label / total annotators in that cluster. Overall score = average across all clusters.

member.name: T:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.FileUpload.ArchiveUploadStrategy
member.summary: Processes archive uploads with production-grade optimizations. - Streams archive to temp file (not RAM) - Extracts image metadata using MetadataExtractor library - Enforces resource limits - Uses bounded parallelism

members.member: Returns true if this strategy can handle the provided upload file.
Process the uploaded file and upload individual items into storage; return list of uploaded items. Storage folder structure: [datasetId] datasetName/[random-uuid]/

member.name: T:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.FileUpload.Metadata.ImageMetadataExtractor
member.summary: Extracts width/height metadata from image files using the MetadataExtractor library. Reads only image header/metadata without decoding pixel data into memory. Supports: PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.FileUpload.Metadata.ImageMetadataExtractor.ExtractDimensions(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{MetadataExtractor.Directory})
member.summary: Extracts image dimensions from metadata directories. Uses type-specific directory methods for accurate extraction.

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.FileUpload.Metadata.ImageMetadataExtractor.TryGetDimensions(MetadataExtractor.Directory,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Helper to safely extract width/height from a directory using tag IDs.

member.name: T:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.FileUpload.Metadata.MediaTypeConstants
member.summary: Constants for supported media types and their extensions.

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.FileUpload.Metadata.MediaTypeConstants.GetContentTypeByExtension(System.String)
member.summary: Maps file extension to MIME content type.

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.FileUpload.Metadata.MetadataExtractorFactory.ExtractMetadataAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String)
member.summary: Extracts metadata from the stream using the appropriate extractor for the given content type. Stream position is preserved when finished.

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Storage.IFileStorage.CreateFileAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a file from a stream and return a public storage URI (or path) where it can be accessed.

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Storage.IFileStorage.DeleteFileAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Delete a single file by its storage URI.

member.name: M:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Storage.IFileStorage.DeleteFolderAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Delete all objects under a folder/prefix.

member.name: P:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Storage.SupabaseStorageOptions.Url
member.summary: Base URL of your Supabase project, e.g. https://xyzcompany.supabase.co

member.name: P:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Storage.SupabaseStorageOptions.ApiKey
member.summary: Service role key or anon key with storage permissions.

member.name: P:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Storage.SupabaseStorageOptions.Bucket
member.summary: Default bucket name to upload files to.

member.name: P:DataLabelProject.Business.Services.Storage.SupabaseStorageOptions.UsePublicUrl
member.summary: When true the returned upload URL will be the public object URL for the bucket.
